name: Yin
bio:
Noble-born, he witnessed his family being destroyed by demons. He made a contract with the Moonlit Witch Celestia to gain Spirit Control Magic, abandoning his human identity to avenge his family.

Role: Magical Single Target Control
Specialty: A backline Control-type hero good at AOE damage; has a chance to apply Tear and Parasite effects. When a parasitized enemy unit dies, it deals AOE damage.

skillSlots.name: Puppet Breath
skillSlots.description: Attacks 2 enemies with lowest HP Ratio for 112% M.DMG with 60% probability to apply [Bleed].
